description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle of Complete Hemp Face & Eye Moisturizer Cream CBD, featuring a tall, slim profile with a white matte finish. The front label displays the brand name, product name, and key information in dark, clear text, while the rest of the bottle is covered in fine, light gray text and subtle geometric patterns. The cap is a simple, smooth, opaque white cylinder that appears to be a screw-on type, seamlessly integrated with the bottle. The back and sides of the bottle are densely printed with product details, instructions, and regulatory icons, including a QR code. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on clarity and minimalism. This type of bottle is commonly found in personal care routines and could be seen discarded or used in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public restrooms.
description: A tall, slim white cylindrical bottle of Complete Hemp Face & Eye Moisturizer Cream CBD with a smooth screw-on cap and minimalist printed graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Complete Hemp branding, product name, and main label details in clear, dark text.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying dense fine print, regulatory icons, and minimal branding, with the cap and bottle's cylindrical shape prominent.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting extensive product information, a QR code, and the continuation of the geometric pattern.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the main label and the densely printed back, with the cap and bottle's smooth surface visible.
